email_generated.subject: Quick question about your engineering workflow, Sarah
email_generated.body:
Hi Sarah,

I noticed TechStartup Inc has been scaling quickly — congrats on the recent Series A.

As CTO, you're probably spending more time than you'd like on operational tasks that could be automated: deployment pipelines, incident routing, onboarding new engineers.

We help technical teams automate these workflows using n8n and AI, typically saving 10-15 hours per week. One recent client (similar stage, 30-person engineering team) cut their incident response time by 60%.

Would a 15-minute call next week make sense to see if there's a fit?

Best,
Enes
email_generated.followup:
Hi Sarah,

Just floating this back up — I know CTOs have packed inboxes.

Happy to share the case study I mentioned (the 60% incident response improvement) if that's useful, no call needed.

Enes
